p2p.title: P2P Configuration
p2p.desc: Scan the QR code below with the N.E.K.O. App to auto-configure connection
p2p.step1: Make sure your phone and PC are on the same WiFi
p2p.step2: Open N.E.K.O. App and tap "Scan QR"
p2p.step3: Scan the code — connection sets up automatically

qrScanner.permissionDenied: Camera permission required to scan QR code
qrScanner.cameraPermissionRequired: Camera permission required to scan QR codes

serverConfig.title: Server Configuration
serverConfig.enterValidPort: Please enter a valid port number (1-65535)
serverConfig.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset to default configuration?
serverConfig.instruction1: 1. Launch Nekotong app on your computer
serverConfig.instruction2: 2. Check "Connection Address" in the top-left corner
serverConfig.instruction3: 3. Enter the IP address and port shown below
serverConfig.ipHint: Enter the IP part of the connection address shown in Nekotong
serverConfig.tip1: Make sure your phone and computer are on the same WiFi network
serverConfig.tip2: If connection fails, check your firewall settings
serverConfig.tip3: You can also use QR scanning for automatic configuration

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.iosCannotExit: You must agree to the Privacy Policy to use this app. To exit, please close the app from your home screen.
privacy.content:
Welcome to N.E.K.O. (hereinafter referred to as "the App"). Please read the following Privacy Policy carefully before using the App.

1. Information We Collect
The App only stores the following information locally on your device:
· Server connection settings (host address, port)
· Language preference
· Character and UI personalization settings

2. Permission Usage
· Camera: Used only for QR code scanning to configure server connections and to support real-time visual features.
· Microphone: Used only for voice input. Audio data is never uploaded to any third-party server.
· Network: Used to communicate with your self-hosted N.E.K.O. server.

3. Data Sharing
The App does not collect, transmit, or sell your personal information to any third party. The App contains no third-party advertising SDKs, analytics SDKs, or behavioral tracking components.

4. Data Security
All configuration data is stored on your local device. The App has no remote access to this data.

5. Contact Us
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the project's official channels.

By continuing to use the App, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to this Privacy Policy.
